risk_title: Political and Governance Risk Remains High
risk_summary: Political and governance risks are rated as High across all assessment periods (approval, last approved rating, and proposed rating), indicating persistent governance fragility affecting project implementation in Guinea.
evidence_quote: Political and Governance High High High

risk_title: Contractor Non-Performance and Potential Insecurity in Mambia Region
risk_summary: Complete lack of progress on 322 km of road rehabilitation in Mambia with contract termination planned, suggesting possible security concerns or governance breakdown preventing contractor operations in the region.
evidence_quote: In Mambia, no progress has been made on 106 km of roads; contracts will be terminated and new contractors recruited.

risk_title: Institutional Capacity and Partner Coordination Challenges
risk_summary: Persistent communication challenges between PIU and partners, combined with technical support firm demobilizing staff without replacement plan, indicate institutional fragility affecting project coordination and implementation continuity.
evidence_quote: PIU collaboration has improved, but partner communication remains a challenge. The technical support firm is demobilizing staff without a replacement plan, which must be clarified to ensure service continuity.

risk_summary: Institutional capacity rating declined from Substantial at approval to Moderate in current assessment, indicating weakening government and implementing agency capacity to sustain project implementation.
evidence_quote: Institutional Capacity for Implementation and Sustainability Substantial Moderate Moderate
